summary: Released 1.1.0 with scene-note paste targets, focused art-field routing, improved chat visibility behavior, and expanded browser/unit coverage.
Released 1.2.0 with explicit selected-token image paste modes, improved storage-permission diagnostics, organized upload-path routing, recommended defaults, and expanded regression coverage.
Smoke harness was updated to isolate scene state between browser tests so stale tokens, tiles, and notes do not leak across cases.
Started and then completed a large runtime and test architecture refactor into domain modules and split harnesses/specs.
Added readiness support and release hardening, including support bundles, media audit, runtime support API, typecheck, verify:bundle, and verify:release.
Hardened native Finder media paste handling, normalized under-described pasted files, restored canvas targeting after chat paste, and preserved reliable GIF behavior across chat and canvas.
New pasted actor-backed tokens should default to actorLink true to reduce ambiguity around Ask-mode behavior for module-created tokens.
Ran a full local release pass: lint, unit tests, typecheck, build, bundle parity, smoke, and verify:release all passed. Smoke result was 92 passed, 1 skipped.
Released 1.3.0 with support/readiness surfaces, release hardening, completed architecture refactor, Finder-native paste improvements, UI polish, and updated defaults/token-link behavior.
GitHub Actions run 24111192623 failed after the 1.3.0 release because branch coverage was 84.99%, below the 85.00% threshold.
Added deterministic unit coverage margin in support and recommended-defaults tests; latest local branch coverage rose to 85.28%.
GitHub Actions run 24111495040 passed after the coverage-margin fix.
Created canonical handoff files under handoff/current.md, handoff/current.json, and handoff/history.ndjson for future context compaction.

Added handoff/schema.json, scripts/validate-handoff.js, npm run handoff:validate, AGENTS handoff rules, and verify:release integration so future agents must keep handoff state truthful and machine-validated.

Decoupled handoff validation from verify:release, switched repo-state file lists to repo-relative paths, and limited repo-state parity checks to non-handoff files so tracked handoff snapshots do not create a fixed-point dirty-state loop.
Relaxed the minimum handoff schema for narrative fields and enforced append-only history updates relative to tracked HEAD content once handoff/history.ndjson is committed.
Refreshed the handoff snapshots after strict review feedback so the current thread state, recent turns, and refined handoff protocol are now captured together and revalidated.
Committed the broader repo/runtime/test/docs/tooling change set as 0f03226 (Refine defaults and support tooling).
Refreshed the handoff snapshots to a clean post-0f03226 baseline so future agents inherit the refined protocol and a non-handoff-clean repo snapshot.

Re-reviewed AGENTS.md, refreshed the tracked handoff snapshot against the clean main branch at 6fe72f0, and carried forward the current maintainer guidance around maximum-verbosity verification and ignored .playwright-cli debug artifacts.
Released 1.3.1 with Foundry V14.359 verified compatibility, V14 ProseMirror chat fallback insertion fixes, and hardened V14 Playwright coverage.
Refreshed the handoff snapshot after the 1.3.1 V14 compatibility release and recorded the resolved ProseMirror chat reset review finding.
Refreshed the handoff snapshot after unreleased PDF paste support implementation and full local validation; no new release was created.
validation: verify:release passed against foundry-v14-dev at http://127.0.0.1:30014 with 598 unit tests passed and Playwright smoke result 94 passed, 1 skipped

summary: Refreshed the handoff snapshot after unreleased audio paste support implementation and local release-gate validation; no new release was created and smoke was skipped because no local Foundry runtime was reachable.
validation: npm run verify:release passed local lint/unit/typecheck/bundle/copy gate with 641 unit tests and runtime coverage 99.61% statements, 100.00% functions, 85.42% branches; smoke skipped at http://127.0.0.1:30000

summary: Refreshed the handoff snapshot after standalone live Foundry smoke passed for unreleased audio paste support; no new release was created.
validation: FOUNDRY_URL=http://127.0.0.1:30014 npm run test:smoke passed with 98 passed and 1 skipped after an exact-button selector fix in test/playwright/smoke.canvas-media.spec.js
